mapper.insert: insert into articles (id, slug, title, description, body, user_id, created_at, updated_at) values( #{article.id}, #{article.slug}, #{article.title}, #{article.description}, #{article.body}, #{article.userId}, #{article.createdAt}, #{article.updatedAt} )
mapper.sql: select A.id articleId, A.slug articleSlug, A.title articleTitle, A.description articleDescription, A.body articleBody, A.user_id articleUserId, A.created_at articleCreatedAt, A.updated_at articleUpdatedAt from articles A
